title: External Plugin Install
objective: Install a real local external plugin fixture, refresh OpenClaw plugin state, and verify the gateway remains healthy without dependency or registry errors.

phases.title: Provision Plugin Env
phases.intent: Start a clean OpenClaw env before installing an external plugin.

phases.title: Install Local Plugin
phases.intent: Use OpenClaw's real plugin install command against a local external plugin fixture.

phases.title: Restart After Install
phases.intent: Restart the gateway so OpenClaw loads the installed external plugin from persisted state.
